title: capsella tibelensis
intro: Capsella tibelensis, also known as the Tibetan cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a type of wild mustard that has been used in traditional Tibetan medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Capsella tibelensis include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or added to soups to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
